title: The Clever Fox and the Magic Apple
titleZh: 聪明的狐狸和魔法苹果
moral: Sharing with others makes every gift more magical.
moralZh: 与他人分享，会让每一份礼物都变得更加神奇。

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Deep in the golden forest, a clever fox named Lily found something wonderful — a shiny red apple that glowed in the sunlight.

paragraphs.speaker: Lily
paragraphs.text: "Oh my!" said Lily. "This must be a magic apple! I will keep it all for myself!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: But just then, she heard a small voice. It was her friend Bear, sitting alone under a tree.

paragraphs.speaker: Bear
paragraphs.text: "I'm so hungry," Bear said sadly. "I haven't eaten anything all day."

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Lily looked at her apple. Then she looked at Bear. She thought for a moment.

paragraphs.speaker: Lily
paragraphs.text: "Here, Bear," said Lily. "Let's share this apple together."

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: The moment she broke the apple in two, something amazing happened. The apple began to glow even brighter, and it smelled like flowers and honey.

paragraphs.speaker: Bear
paragraphs.text: "Wow!" Bear gasped. "It really is magic! Thank you, Lily. You are the best friend ever!"

paragraphs.speaker: Lily
paragraphs.text: Lily smiled. "I think the magic only works when you share it," she said. "I feel so happy right now!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And they were right. The apple tasted sweeter than anything they had ever eaten before. Together, they watched the golden forest glow all around them.
